title: GenomeLens 点图
description: 用于把双物种锚点关系直观绘制成点图，帮助快速判断大片段保守、倒位、易位、串联重复或噪声分布，是检查共线性整体轮廓和数据质量的经典入口图。
description_en: Visualizes pairwise anchor relationships as a dotplot, helping users quickly inspect large conserved segments, inversions, translocations, tandem duplication patterns, and noise structure. It is the classic first-look figure for overall synteny structure and data quality.
context: 双物种宏观共线性结构与重排模式快速判读。
context_en: Rapid inspection of pairwise macro-synteny structure and rearrangement patterns.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含这对比较物种注释与序列文件的目录，用于为点图建立坐标轴与物种背景信息。
params.description_en: Directory containing the annotation and sequence files for the species pair, used to establish the coordinate axes and species context for the dotplot.

params.label: Anchors 文件
params.description: 双物种锚点文件，决定点图中每个同源落点的位置与分布格局，是判断共线性连续性和异常散点的核心输入。
params.description_en: Pairwise anchors file that determines the position and distribution of homologous points on the dotplot. It is the key input for judging synteny continuity and abnormal scatter patterns.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 画布尺寸，例如 10x10；留空使用默认。
params.description_en: Figure size, e.g. 10x10; leave empty for default.
